verifications.evidence_quote: Steffan Tomlinson, who previously served as CFO of Confluent and Palo Alto Networks, joined Stripe as CFO.
Page lists 47 roles tagged Senior/Staff/Principal and 8 tagged mid-level when filtered to engineering.
verifications.notes: Page contains the role counts; the '85%' framing and 'no junior pipeline' interpretation is the analyst's inference.

verifications.evidence_quote: Customer logos: Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Salesforce, Shopify.
Stripe today announced the acquisition of Bridge, the leading stablecoin platform.
Engineering blog index page lists posts; the specific 'Ruby at scale' framing is paraphrased from multiple posts about Rails and Sorbet.
verifications.notes: The exact post title in the headline may be loose paraphrase; the underlying claim about Rails+Sorbet is well-supported.
